message:
fix(connectors): prevent false-positive directory detection from shadowing

Harden storage detection for both Claude Code and OpenCode connectors
to prevent false matches when the CASS data directory itself contains
"claude" or "opencode" in its name:

- ClaudeCodeConnector: remove loose file_name string check ("claude")
  and require 'projects' subdirectory to exist, which is the actual
  structural signal of a Claude Code projects root
- OpenCodeConnector: replace OR-based heuristic (name contains
  "opencode" OR has session/message/part subdirs) with strict AND
  check requiring both 'session' AND 'message' subdirectories,
  which are the definitive OpenCode storage markers
- Update looks_like_opencode_storage test to verify name alone
  is insufficient and subdirectories are required

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
